testsuites.name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local

testsuite.name: Retrieve all Payment Methods (by filter) for checkout

testcase.name: Payment methods array is not empty
Each payment method has correct structure and data types
Disabled methods must have a valid 'disabledReason'
If 'feeRange' exists, it must contain min and max numbers
The 'validityDateFrom' property should be in YYYY-MM-DD format

testsuite.name: Get payment method by ID for CHECKOUT

testcase.name: ID in response matches requested ID

testsuite.name: Retrieve all Payment Methods (by filter) for IO

testcase.name: Payment methods array is not empty
Each payment method has correct structure and data types
Disabled methods must have a valid 'disabledReason'
If 'feeRange' exists, it must contain min and max numbers
The 'validityDateFrom' property should be in YYYY-MM-DD format

testsuite.name: Get payment method by ID for IO

testcase.name: Status code is 200 OK

failure.message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 404

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Get payment method by ID for IO. Test description: Status code is 200 OK. Error message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 404. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 200 but got 404 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:4).

testcase.name: Response has required properties
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Get payment method by ID for IO. Test description: Response has required properties. Error message: expected { …(3) } to have property 'id'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected { …(3) } to have property 'id' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:3:4).

testcase.name: ID in response matches requested ID
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Get payment method by ID for IO. Test description: ID in response matches requested ID. Error message: expected undefined to deeply equal '378d0b4f-8b69-46b0-8215-07785fe1aad4'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to deeply equal '378d0b4f-8b69-46b0-8215-07785fe1aad4' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:4:4).

testsuite.name: Get payment method by ID - Not Found (404)
Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT [200]

testcase.name: Status code is 200 OK

failure.message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 500

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT [200]. Test description: Status code is 200 OK. Error message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 500. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 200 but got 500 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:6).

testcase.name: Response has all required fields with correct types

failure.message: expected { detail: 'Generic Error', …(2) } to have property 'paymentMethodName'

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT [200]. Test description: Response has all required fields with correct types. Error message: expected { detail: 'Generic Error', …(2) } to have property 'paymentMethodName'. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected { detail: 'Generic Error', …(2) } to have property 'paymentMethodName' at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:3:6).

testcase.name: Bundles array is not empty
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT [200]. Test description: Bundles array is not empty. Error message: .empty was passed non-string primitive undefined. Stacktrace: AssertionError: .empty was passed non-string primitive undefined at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:4:6).

testcase.name: Each bundle has required fields with correct types
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT [200]. Test description: Each bundle has required fields with correct types. Error message: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'forEach'). Stacktrace: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'forEach') at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:5:6).

testcase.name: brandAssets values are strings if present
pspBusinessName is a string when present (bundleName is deprecated)
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT [200]. Test description: pspBusinessName is a string when present (bundleName is deprecated). Error message: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'forEach'). Stacktrace: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'forEach') at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:8:6).

testsuite.name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT (Max Occurrences) [200]

testcase.name: Status code is 200 OK

failure.message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 500

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT (Max Occurrences) [200]. Test description: Status code is 200 OK. Error message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 500. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 200 but got 500 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:7).

testcase.name: Bundles do not exceed maxOccurrences
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT (Max Occurrences) [200]. Test description: Bundles do not exceed maxOccurrences. Error message: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length'). Stacktrace: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'length') at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:7).

testcase.name: Status code is 200 OK

failure.message: expected response to have status code 200 but got 500

testcase.name: Bundles array is not empty

failure.message: expected undefined to be an array

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT (Multi Notice) [200]. Test description: Bundles array is not empty. Error message: expected undefined to be an array. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to be an array at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:8).

testcase.name: Each bundle taxPayerFee is non-negative
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT (Multi Notice) [200]. Test description: Each bundle taxPayerFee is non-negative. testsuite.name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT (Missing Touchpoint) [500]

testcase.name: Status code is 500 — Jackson MismatchedInputException on missing touchpoint

testsuite.name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT (Empty Payment Notices) [400]
Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT (Not Found) [404]
Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT (No Bundle Available) [404]

testcase.name: Status code is 404 Not Found

failure.message: expected response to have status code 404 but got 500

testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT (No Bundle Available) [404]. Test description: Status code is 404 Not Found. Error message: expected response to have status code 404 but got 500. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected response to have status code 404 but got 500 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:12).

testcase.name: ProblemJson structure is valid
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: ad12817b-d22d-4ec1-b9a2-3b44a1682315. Collection name: Pagopa eCommerce payment methods handler local. Request name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT (No Bundle Available) [404]. Test description: ProblemJson structure is valid. Error message: expected 500 to deeply equal 404. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected 500 to deeply equal 404 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:12).

testsuite.name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT (Missing x-client-id) [400]

testcase.name: Status code is 400 Bad Request when x-client-id is missing

testsuite.name: Calculate Fees for Payment Method for CHECKOUT (Missing x-language) [400]

testcase.name: Status code is 400 Bad Request when x-language is missing
